title: terminalia chicharronia subsp. domingensis
intro: Terminalia chicharronia subsp. domingensis, also known as Dominican Terminalia, is a subspecies of plant in the family Combretaceae, native to the Dominican Republic. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Terminalia chicharronia subsp. domingensis include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
